fe49a1a4-38a6-472b-8a34-7d9f6d79e235.note: Re-blessed 2026-07-07 after the teacher-chain stitch (app/teacher_chain.py) recovered the spans the round-1 pixel audit flagged as the KNOWN GAP. Pixel-verified on frames at 152/165/172/185/200/205/245/265/275s: the one adult is labelled teacher throughout. teacher_present_ms 208600->282000: her fragments stolen by student tracks (crouch handoffs raw 325, mid-track swaps raw 404/450/522) are reclaimed, so presence is continuous 0-282000 (last detection 282.0s, within the 5s end margin). The 214.8-222.2s off-camera moment (she steps to a near-camera bottom-left corner desk) is bridged by events.bridge_offscreen_gaps because both edges are clear of the door, so it is NOT a spurious exit/enter -> entries stay 1 (video start), exits 0. teacher_board_ms 42800->53600: board visits at ~163-169s (raw 325) and ~274-276s (raw 522, the old track-17 tail steal) are now hers; all board intervals pixel-verified at-board. total_tracks 40->42: evicting the wrongly-merged corner student splits it back out (more identities, but each now correct).

report_only.note: fewer tracks with unchanged gates = better re-ID (less fragmentation); more = regression. 40->42 here is intentional: the teacher chain evicted 2 wrongly-merged student fragments into their own identities.
